PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

  ?song rdfs:label ?label ; wdt:P50 ?author .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(regex(?label , 'hallelujah' , 'i'))
  .
}
